_scope_note: plugins[] lists distributable plugin packages that have plugin.json manifests and belong to the community source-available distribution. internal_test_plugins[] are tracked for automated test setup but excluded from default bootstrap and public demo/runtime profiles. tooling_dirs[] are directories under plugins/ that are not plugin packages.
description: Single source of truth for AuraBoot source-available scope. Defines which backend modules, plugins, and tests belong to the community distribution. Adjust this file when moving features between OSS and enterprise.

test_excludes_rationale._note: Explanations for each entry in test_excludes. Plain-string exclusion list is what the playwright.oss.config.ts runner consumes; this map is metadata only.
[A] full project-management plugin (enterprise; not the OSS tpm template)
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/plugin/pm-master-data.spec.ts: [A] full project-management plugin (enterprise; not the OSS tpm template)
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/plugin/pm-member-management.sp: [A] full project-management plugin (enterprise; not the OSS tpm template)
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/plugin/pm-my-tasks.spec.ts: [A] full project-management plugin (enterprise; not the OSS tpm template)
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/plugin/pm-project-lifecycle.sp: [A] full project-management plugin (enterprise; not the OSS tpm template)
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/plugin/pm-smoke.spec.ts: [A] full project-management plugin (enterprise; not the OSS tpm template)
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/plugin/pm-task-associations.sp: [A] full project-management plugin (enterprise; not the OSS tpm template)
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/plugin/pm-workspace-interactio: [A] full project-management plugin (enterprise; not the OSS tpm template)
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/aurabot/pcba-procurement-agent: [A] pcba-procurement plugin is enterprise (auraboot-enterprise/plugins/pcba-procurement) — spec navigates to PCBA ERP sidebar + /p/pe_procurement_comparison which only exist in enterprise overlay.
[A] same pcba-procurement enterprise plugin; create-draft / L3-approval / reject-draft flows all go through PCBA ERP nav and pe_procurement_comparison commands, none of which ship in OSS.
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/plugin/plugin-all-packages-smo: [A] asserts 14 enterprise plugins installed (annual-plan, dual-prevention, asset-management, crm non-starter, sales, procurement, inventory, finance, quality, pcba-manufacturing, pcba-solution, project-management, quarry-industry); only e2e-test-order overlaps OSS. All 13 cases fail in OSS.
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/organization/member-detail.spe: [A] references /dynamic/tenant-member route not shipped in OSS (all 3 cases fail).
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/organization/org-department.sp: [A] 1/5 cases (create-department-via-...) uses enterprise-only field; whole file excluded because playwright.oss.config.ts filter is file-path level only — 4 passing sibling cases lost. See per_case_excludes_todo.
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/saved-view/saved-view-column-s: [A] CS-007 column-order persistence relies on enterprise wiring; whole file excluded (7 passing siblings lost). See per_case_excludes_todo.
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/user/user-management.spec.ts: [A] UM-006/UM-007 role assignment/list are enterprise; whole file excluded (9 passing siblings lost). See per_case_excludes_todo.
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/aurabot/pcba-quality-agent-ent: [A] pcba quality flow depends on enterprise quality/product-catalog plugins and Quality sidebar menus; OSS stack does not ship /p/qc_* pages.
test_excludes_rationale.tests/e2e/aurabot/pcba-quality-agent-wri: [A] same pcba quality enterprise flow; imports /app/plugins-enterprise/product-catalog and navigates Quality/CAPA pages absent from OSS.
[A] BFI-004 asserts /api/inbox endpoint; unified Inbox API lives in enterprise platform only. OSS backend has no /api/inbox controller.

per_case_excludes_todo._note: The current playwright.oss.config.ts filter operates at file path level only. These are the specific failing cases we actually want to skip; their sibling cases in the same files currently pass but are excluded along with them. When scope filter gains per-title support, move the file back into test_paths and list individual case titles here.
